title: Dhammapada, Chapter 16: Affection
description: Chapter 16 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 16 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Give up what is before, give up what is behind, give up what is in the middle, and cross to the farther shore.
